## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] `ruff check src tests` is clean
- [ ] New behavior has tests under `tests/<module>/`
- [ ] Docs updated if a user-facing command, flag, or claim changed
- [ ] Nothing half-wired — everything in this PR works out of the box
